title: Meetings; quorum
doc_html:
§966. Meetings; quorum

            A. The board shall meet annually at a time and place to be fixed by it, and at such other times as may be necessary.

            B. A majority of the board constitutes a quorum.

            Acts 2022, No. 271, §2.
doc_text:
§966.  Meetings; quorum
A.  The board shall meet annually at a time and place to be fixed by it, and at such
other times as may be necessary.
B.  A majority of the board constitutes a quorum.
Acts 2022, No. 271, §2.
